evals.expected_output: Parallel agent launches with isolated worktrees, one per story
expectations: The skill validates story codes exist in SmartSuite before launching
The skill reports the list of stories that will be implemented
The skill launches one Agent per story with isolation: worktree
All agents are launched in a single message (parallel, not sequential)
Each agent runs with run_in_background: true
The skill sets up a monitoring loop using /loop after launching agents
The skill reports a progress summary table as agents complete

evals.expected_output: Fetches 3 stories from SmartSuite backlog and launches parallel agents
expectations: The skill queries SmartSuite for the top 3 backlog stories
The skill reports which stories were found before launching
The skill launches parallel agents in isolated worktrees
